per_page.description: Number of results requested in a single page.

minimal.name: minimal
minimal.description: Return array of just service 'id' and 'modified_date'.  When using this parameter aim to return all services within one call.

full.name: full
full.description: Return a fully nested service, service_at_location, or organization based on the request.

modified_after.name: modified_after
modified_after.description: Return all results modified on or after this datetime.

taxonomy_term_id.name: taxonomy_term_id
taxonomy_term_id.description: Search for records with particular taxonomy_term.

taxonomy_id.name: taxonomy_id
taxonomy_id.description: Search for records which contain any term with this taxonomy.

organization_id.name: organization_id
organization_id.description: Search for services which contain services that that this organization provides.

full_service.name: full_service
full_service.description: Fully nested organization with service array that contains full service information.

postcode.name: postcode
postcode.description: The postcode or zip code of a point used to check service coverage. If `service_area` is available, only return results where the postcode exists within the `service_area`.  If `proximity` is provided, only show results within the proximity from the centroid of the postcode.

proximity.name: proximity
proximity.description: Return services that exist within meters from the centroid of the provided postcode

format.name: format
format.description: Return results in the specified format. Default is `json`. Could be `ndjson` which should stream all the results without pagination.

location_type.title: Location Type
location_type.description: The type of location: physical, postal, or virtual.

service_status.title: Service Status
service_status.description: The current status of the service.

frequency.title: Frequency
frequency.description: iCal (RFC 5545) - How often the frequency repeats.

byday.title: By Day
byday.description: iCal (RFC 5545) - Comma separated days of the week using ISO 8601 abbreviations. When freq is MONTHLY each part can be preceded by a positive or negative integer to represent occurrence in month (e.g. 2MO = second Monday, -1FR = last Friday).
